## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue (if applicable). Provide motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
Please check the options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring (styling, performance improvements)

## Verification & Testing
Describe the tests/verifications performed to ensure correctness of your changes:
- *e.g., Compiled frontend using `npm run build`*
- *e.g., Tested user log meals endpoints manually using Postman*

## PR Checklist
Before submitting, please verify that you have completed the following checklist items:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new compile errors or warnings.
- [ ] I have verified that no private API keys or database secrets are included in my changes.
